name: HealthEquity Visa Health Savings Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. This is an HSA debit card for accessing health savings account funds.

earning_rates.notes: No rewards — this is an HSA administration card. Cash back may be available at select merchants through HealthEquity's rewards program, but not standard earning.

other_benefits.name: HSA administration
other_benefits.description: Card draws directly from HealthEquity HSA; can be used everywhere Visa debit cards are accepted for qualified medical expenses

other_benefits.name: Investment platform
other_benefits.description: Access to HealthEquity investment platform for HSA funds

sources.notes: HSA Welcome Kit — confirms Visa card issued by The Bancorp Bank

notes: This is NOT a traditional credit card — it is a Visa debit/HSA card issued by The Bancorp Bank that draws directly from the cardholder's HealthEquity HSA. It is used to pay qualified medical expenses with pre-tax HSA dollars. No rewards are earned on standard spending. HealthEquity is one of the largest HSA administrators in the U.S.
